pi_items.metadata_value: SELECT name, longitude FROM world_capitals ORDER BY ABS(longitude - 25.0) LIMIT 1;

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on world_survey.gpkg containing 98 world capitals. The ground_truth_query is invalid because the 'world_capitals' table lacks a 'longitude' column (coordinates are stored in a 'geom' BLOB). This missing column causes 'setup_task.sh' to fail during initialization (exit code 1 on sqlite3 assignment with set -e), meaning QField is never launched. Furthermore, the task asks the agent to set 'name' and 'description' fields when adding a feature to the 'field_observations' layer, but the schema only contains 'observer_name', 'species', 'location', 'obs_date', and 'quality_grade'. The actual closest capital to 25.0E in the dataset is Helsinki (24.9354E).
